mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT object_key AS object_key FROM rs_image WHERE object_key = #{objectKey} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR owner_id = #{currentUserId}) UNION ALL SELECT thumbnail_object_key AS object_key FROM rs_image WHERE thumbnail_object_key = #{objectKey} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR owner_id = #{currentUserId}) UNION ALL SELECT overview_object_key AS object_key FROM rs_image WHERE overview_object_key = #{objectKey} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR owner_id = #{currentUserId}) UNION ALL SELECT object_key AS object_key FROM rs_result_file WHERE object_key = #{objectKey} AND (visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR owner_id = #{currentUserId}) UNION ALL SELECT output_object_key AS object_key FROM rs_task t WHERE t.output_object_key = #{objectKey} AND t.status = 'SUCCESS' AND t.owner_id = #{currentUserId} ) accessible_file
